title: Why LLMs output a probability distribution, not a single fixed answer

artifact_plan.depth_signals: Title is a conceptual question requiring 4+ sub-concepts (token, softmax, sampling, stochastic vs deterministic), a worked generation-loop trace, and real-world patterns — more than atomic but no multi-technology pipeline warranting deep.
artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Three-stage generation loop: context tokens → softmax → probability distribution → sample → output token → append to context (cycle arrow back to start)
